raw_consumer_statement: Got a Citi Bank card XX/XX/2023 0 % interest. Paid every month. They sent me an offer for a XXXX, 8.99 % interest rate. I accepted. On XX/XX/XXXX I paid the remaining balance on my original card. Paid it before the interest started. the balance I paid was XXXX. This should have ended there. They took the original agreement and made it null and void. they are charging me 21.99 % on part of the balance that should have been paid off in XXXX. I am not happy about them breeching the contract I signed. I need some XXXX assistance in this matter.
